# Contributing to My-Virtual-Worlds/OpenSim-Rebuilt

The easiest way to contribute to our work, is to report issues to our [issue tracker](https://github.com/My-Virtual-Worlds/OpenSm-Rebuilt/issues).

In order to contribute code to this project, you must submit a pull request.

When submitting a ticket on the issue tracker or a pull request, you must use the templates provided.  Otherwise we cannot provide you with the best support for your issue or review for your contributed code.

If you have an issue with another project or a project mentioned in our wiki or one of the other files in the repository, please report issues to those projects directly.  Please do not report issues your having with our project code to those projects.  They cannot help you with our code, and we cannot help you with theirs.

Thank you

~EmperorStarfinder
